'''Romany''' was the leader of one of two clans of [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] stranded on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was a former [[Biologist/Legends|biologist]] and had a bushy [[Hair/Legends|mane]].

==Behind the scenes==
"Romany" is another name for the [[Wikipedia:Romani people|Romani]], after whom author [[James Luceno]] modeled Romany's species, the Ryn.<ref name="tosagents">{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/novel/f20001023/index.html|text=Agent of Chaos: An Interview with James Luceno}}</ref><ref name="Space Station Liberty">{{WebCite|url=http://terrania.us/libnotes/2007/02/episode-15-james-luceno-interview.html|text=Episode 15 - James Luceno Interview (Part 2)|work=Space Station Liberty|archiveurl=https://archive.is/9vsQo}}</ref>
